2604.18328.title: FregeLogic at SemEval 2026 Task 11: A Hybrid Neuro-Symbolic Architecture for Content-Robust Syllogistic Validity Prediction
2604.18328.paper_summary: We present FregeLogic, a hybrid neuro-symbolic system for SemEval-2026 Task 11 (Subtask 1), which addresses syllogistic validity prediction while reducing content effects on predictions. Our approach combines an ensemble of five LLM classifiers, spanning three open-weights models (Llama 4 Maverick, Llama 4 Scout, and Qwen3-32B) paired with varied prompting strategies, with a Z3 SMT solver that serves as a formal logic tiebreaker. The central hypothesis is that LLM disagreement within the ensemble signals likely content-biased errors, where real-world believability interferes with logical judgment. By deferring to Z3's structurally-grounded formal verification on these disputed cases, our system achieves 94.3% accuracy with a content effect of 2.85 and a combined score of 41.88 in nested 5-fold cross-validation on the dataset (N=960). This represents a 2.76-point improvement in combined score over the pure ensemble (39.12), with a 0.9% accuracy gain, driven by a 16% reduction in content effect (3.39 to 2.85). Adopting structured-output API calls for Z3 extraction reduced failure rates from ~22% to near zero, and an Aristotelian encoding with existence axioms was validated against task annotations. Our results suggest that targeted neuro-symbolic integration, applying formal methods precisely where ensemble consensus is lowest, can improve the combined accuracy-plus-content-effect metric used by this task.
2604.18328.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了 FregeLogic，一個混合神經符號系統，旨在解決 SemEval-2026 任務 11（子任務 1）中的三段論有效性預測，同時減少內容對預測的影響。<lb/>我們的方法結合了五個 LLM 分類器的集成，涵蓋三個開放權重模型（Llama 4 Maverick、Llama 4 Scout 和 Qwen3-32B），並搭配不同的提示策略，以及一個作為形式邏輯平局打破者的 Z3 SMT 求解器。<lb/>核心假設是，集成中的 LLM 不一致性可能表示內容偏見錯誤，其中現實世界的可信度會干擾邏輯判斷。<lb/>通過對這些有爭議的案例依賴 Z3 的結構性形式驗證，我們的系統在數據集（N=960）上達到了 94.3% 的準確率，內容效應為 2.85，並在嵌套的 5 倍交叉驗證中獲得了 41.88 的綜合得分。<lb/>這比純集成的綜合得分（39.12）提高了 2.76 分，準確率增長了 0.9%，這得益於內容效應減少了 16%（從 3.39 降至 2.85）。<lb/>採用結構化輸出 API 調用進行 Z3 提取，使故障率從約 22% 降至接近零，並且帶有存在公理的亞里士多德編碼已根據任務註釋進行驗證。<lb/>我們的結果表明，針對性的神經符號整合，在集成共識最低的地方精確應用形式方法，可以改善這項任務所使用的綜合準確性加內容效應指標。
2604.18328.author: Adewale Akinfaderin et.al.
